title: BlueNetherite +
description: A unique blue colored texture for Minecraft Ancient Debris blocks.
body:
# Blue Netherite+ 
## Tired of missing Ancient Debris?

Blue Netherite+ isn't just an aesthetic overhaul—it’s a visual upgrade for dedicated miners. By shifting the Netherite palette to a vibrant, electric blue, this pack creates a high-contrast experience that makes your target ores and your finished gear impossible to miss in your inventory.

### Why Miners choose Blue Netherite+:

High-Visibility Ores: Ancient Debris is retextured to stand out sharply against the dull, dark browns and reds of the Netherrack. Stop squinting and start mining faster.

Inventory Clarity: No more guessing which tool is which in a crowded hotbar. The bright blue edges ensure you can identify your gear at a glance, even in low-light mining conditions.

End-Game Style: Once you've finished your strip mining, your hard-earned armor will look like it was forged from pure, solidified frost.

Total Consistency: From the raw scraps you find in the walls to the final ingots in your chest, every stage of the mining process gets the full blue treatment.

Make your mining sessions more efficient and your gear look legendary. Download Blue Netherite+ and brighten up the deep.
